{{Quote|I cannot believe Lucasfilm let me show a dead Jedi Knight with a severed limb.|Adam Hughes reflecting on the cover of ''Star Wars: Purge''|<ref name="DAPurge">{{DeviantArt|username=adamhughes|url=adamhughes/art/Star-Wars-Purge-91408358|name=Adam Hughes|text=Star Wars – Purge|quote=I cannot believe Lucasfilm let me show a dead Jedi Knight with a severed limb.}}</ref>}}
'''Adam Hughes''' is a comic book artist. He has drawn many famous characters including [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Wikipedia:Wonder Woman|Wonder Woman]], [[Wikipedia:Vampirella|Vampirella]], [[Wikipedia:Cat Woman|Cat Woman]], [[Wikipedia:Lara Croft|Lara Croft]] and [[Wikipedia:Storm (comics)|Storm.]] He has drawn covers and art for such titles as ''Classic [[Star Wars]]'' movie adaptations, [[Wikipedia:Justice League|''The Justice League'']], [[Wikipedia:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']], [[Wikipedia:Buffy The Vampire Slayer|''Buffy the Vampire Slayer'']], [[Wikipedia:Tomb Raider|''Tomb Raider'']], [[Wikipedia:Legion of Super-Heroes|''Legionnaires'']], [[Wikipedia:Ghost (Dark Horse comics)|''Ghost'']], and [[Wikipedia:Gen¹³|''Gen¹³'']], to only name a few.

Hughes also began creating designs for [[Wizards of the Coast]] roleplaying games such as the ''[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game]]''. For [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], Hughes was asked to introduce fans to new heroes through his illustrations of the teen [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]] and the female [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]] [[Sia-Lan Wezz]].

In [[2007]] he designed the cover art for [[Legacy (2006) 7|''Legacy'' (2006) 7]], and has supplied art for the ''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Trading Card Set''.
